chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Yellow buds and yellow case.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Oh my god, mango season inspired colour.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So this is Realme T500 Pro.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So let me tell you about it in just 60 seconds.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If you think TWS is boring,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: then no, Realme has changed the thinking here.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: This candy colour inspired earbuds

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: design wise is very unique,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: colour shade is very crazy and if you see

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: then its style is very rectangular type

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: and is super lightweight and comfortable

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: but it only comes in 4.5 grams.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: So what does it mean?

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You can use it in long day usage easily

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Now main feature, 50 decibel ANC.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: These are not just numbers,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: it is very effective in real life too.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Especially it cuts background noises very well.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You get 6 mics for calls,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: so clarity is also solid.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: High resolution audio plus LHDC

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: support gives you audio details,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: bass and vocals are very clear.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And as soon as you turn on spatial audio,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: you get a proper 360 degree surround experience

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: like mini theatre.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If I talk about battery,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: I get solid battery in this price range.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If you are using it without case,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: it gives 9-10 hours power backup

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: and with case you get 30 plus hours playback.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: And it charges in just 10 minutes.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: You don't have to worry about that.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: In just 10 minutes your earbuds

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: get ready for 10 hours of playback.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: If you want a stylish earbuds

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: with unique design and unique colour shade

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Add to piece Rs 2599,

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: then Realme T500 Pro is meant for you.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: Now tell me in the comments

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro
chunks.text: how did you like the earbuds.

text: Yellow buds and yellow case. Oh my god, mango season inspired colour. So this is Realme T500 Pro. So let me tell you about it in just 60 seconds. If you think TWS is boring, then no, Realme has changed the thinking here. This candy colour inspired earbuds design wise is very unique, colour shade is very crazy and if you see then its style is very rectangular type and is super lightweight and comfortable but it only comes in 4.5 grams. So what does it mean? You can use it in long day usage easily Now main feature, 50 decibel ANC. These are not just numbers, it is very effective in real life too. Especially it cuts background noises very well. You get 6 mics for calls, so clarity is also solid. High resolution audio plus LHDC support gives you audio details, bass and vocals are very clear. And as soon as you turn on spatial audio, you get a proper 360 degree surround experience like mini theatre. If I talk about battery, I get solid battery in this price range. If you are using it without case, it gives 9-10 hours power backup and with case you get 30 plus hours playback. And it charges in just 10 minutes. You don't have to worry about that. In just 10 minutes your earbuds get ready for 10 hours of playback. If you want a stylish earbuds with unique design and unique colour shade Add to piece Rs 2599, then Realme T500 Pro is meant for you. Now tell me in the comments how did you like the earbuds.
